title: Levetiracetam for Blood-Spinal Cord Barrier Protection in HIE-Related Neuroinflammation

input.description: Levetiracetam demonstrates blood-spinal cord barrier protection and anti-inflammatory effects in acute CNS injury models by suppressing perforin expression and reducing barrier permeability. Given that HIE involves similar blood-brain barrier disruption and neuroinflammatory cascades, levetiracetam may provide dual benefits: seizure control (already indicated) plus neuroprotective barrier stabilization. The drug's established safety profile in neonates and its mechanism of reducing inflammatory macrophage infiltration align with the pathophysiology of diffuse cystic encephalomalacia. This represents a repurposing opportunity where an already-prescribed medication may deliver additional neuroprotective value during the critical 0-2 year plasticity window.
